---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability, API improvement, SDK feature, or compliance enhancement
  for SENTINEL
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

**What problem does this solve?**
Describe the use case or gap this addresses. Who would benefit and how?

**Proposed solution**
A clear description of what you'd like to see added or changed.

**Feature area**
Which part of SENTINEL would this affect?
- [ ] Ingestion API
- [ ] Risk Scoring / detection logic
- [ ] Audit Log / compliance infrastructure
- [ ] Federation layer
- [ ] Fairness / demographic parity auditing
- [ ] Explainability / moderator-facing outputs
- [ ] Node.js SDK
- [ ] Python SDK
- [ ] Docker / deployment
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

**Alternatives considered**
Have you considered any alternative approaches? Why do you prefer this one?

**Regulatory / compliance angle** (if applicable)
Does this relate to EU DSA, UK Online Safety Act, COPPA, or another regulatory requirement? If so, which requirement and how does this feature address it?

**Willingness to contribute**
- [ ] I'd like to implement this myself (please assign it to me)
- [ ] I can help with design/review but not implementation
- [ ] Just proposing — happy for anyone to pick it up

**Additional context**
Any other context, examples, or references that would help.
